# Front of House

> Front of House is a web and brand studio built only for restaurants. We design the brand, capture photos and video on site, build a custom website the owner owns outright, and keep it sharp year to year with flat-fee, hands-on care.

## What we do

Front of House offers four services for restaurants:

1. The Website (Build): A custom website the restaurant owner owns outright, code and all. Hand-built, fast, mobile-first, accessible. Optimized for AI search (AEO/GEO). One-time build from $2,000, priced to scope.
2. Care & Hosting: Hosting, maintenance, and support for a flat $450/year fee. No monthly rental. Includes Maitre, the front-of-house AI assistant, and a full exit kit.
3. Brand & Design (optional): Logo, identity, menu design, color, type, and art direction for restaurants.
4. Capture / Photo & Video (optional): On-site photo and video of the space, food, and team.

## How it works

1. Scope your build: we look at the restaurant's menu, photos, and needs, then price it to the restaurant.
2. We design & build it: custom website, with branding and on-site photo/video if needed. The owner owns the code.
3. You own it. We keep it sharp: a flat $450/year Care fee covers hosting, maintenance, and support.

## Why Front of House

- You own your website: real custom code you keep for good, with an exit kit so you can leave anytime.
- Pay once, not every month: no $200 to $500 monthly rental. One-time build fee plus flat yearly Care.
- Edit it yourself or ask Maitre: Maitre is the front-of-house AI. It drafts changes, we review them, they go live.
- Built for AI search: optimized so diners find the restaurant through AI answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews), not just traditional search.
- 100% restaurants: that is all we build for.

## Pricing

- One-time build: from $2,000, priced to scope. Most builds land $2,000 to $4,000. Larger restaurants run $5,000+.
- Care plan: $450/year. Hosting, security, backups, Maitre AI, changes by our team, AEO foundation, exit kit.
- Care+ plan: $900/year. Everything in Care plus ongoing AI-search content, analytics, email capture, seasonal refreshes, and strategy time.
- Three-year cost comparison: Front of House $3,350 to $5,350 vs. subscription rentals $7,200 to $18,000.

## The problem we solve

Subscription-site companies rent restaurants a website for $200 to $500 a month ($2,400 to $6,000 a year, indefinitely) and the owner never owns it. Front of House does the opposite: the owner buys and owns the site, then pays a flat yearly fee to keep it sharp.

## Company details

- Type: Restaurant Web Studio
- Specialization: 100% restaurants (independents and small groups, 1 to 6+ locations)
- Markets: Park City, Utah and metro Atlanta, Georgia
- Website: https://frontofhouse.studio
- Email: hello@frontofhouse.studio
